issues.title: Duplicate tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in post-referral workflow
issues.desc: HAs and TCs were receiving double tasks for Loan Simple leads in the post-referral workflow. The root cause was identified as a weird glitch related to HubSpot's handling of associations and filters for LS leads. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close out the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters did not include these deal stages as unenrollment or suppression criteria. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters on 2026-03-09 to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually cancel any open workflow tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO change not reflected in automated agent emails — previous LO details persisted
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to the agent still showed the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The fix was handled on the product/backend side. Luis resolved the issue on 2026-03-13.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually send a corrected email to the agent with the updated LO information.

issues.title: TC workflow tasks not triggering on Offer Accepted when deal stage had previously been toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow did not re-trigger because re-enrollment criteria did not include the Offer Accepted deal stage. Madelaine identified that 'deal stage offer accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria and updated the workflow on 2026-03-16.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals marked as Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their tasks for these deals. HubSpot support was contacted and the issue was confirmed fixed on 2026-04-01. The root cause was not explicitly stated.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately 2026-02-04 and 2026-04-01 that did not generate TC tasks, and send closing info collection emails manually.
